title: 3pc Large Serrated Tweezer Tong Set with Case- 12, 10, and 8 Inch
description:
Performing as a pick up tool, tongs, or precision tool, these tweezers can be used anywhere! Use them when working with crafts, hobbies, miniature parts, tight spaces, watch or jewelry repair, soldering, and more! The stainless steel tweezers come with a hand grip and serrated tip to tightly hold on to your precision project.This set includes a 12",10", and 8" tweezers, complete with carrying/storage case. Add these to your tool bag, drawer, kitchen, or office!
